feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fiori Elements (RAP) vs Freestyle UI5 – Best fit for complex UI with IconTabs and F4 help?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are evaluating whether to go for Fiori Elements using RAP (OData V4) or a Freestyle SAPUI5 application for a new requirement.

Here’s the context:

  • OData V4 service is already available, built using the ABAP RAP model.

  • The required UI layout includes:

    • A custom header at the top

    • A SplitApp layout below

    • On the right pane, multiple IconTab filters

    • Input fields with F4 Help inside each tab

Given the flexibility needed in the layout and UI interactions (especially for SplitApp and F4 integration inside tabs), I’m trying to decide whether this is better suited for:

🔹 Fiori Elements + RAP + Annotations + Custom sections (Flexible Programming Model)
or
🔹 Freestyle SAPUI5 with smart controls or custom controls

Questions:

  1. Would Fiori Elements (Object Page or Flexible Column Layout) allow such a layout with minimal custom sections?

  2. How well does the annotation-driven model support IconTab structures and embedded F4 help in nested sections?

  3. Are there limitations or known workarounds for achieving SplitApp-like behavior in Fiori Elements?

Looking forward to expert advice and experience-based suggestions.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Missing annotations in metadata
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to create one app, that only show the data from different tables, this is to avoid having to create a separate (fiori element) app for each table. Or creating a new app for a new table. 
To achieve this we have several CDS view (for each table a CDS view) which will be expose in one oData service V2. For each table there is an interface (entity) view, a consumption (root enitty) view, metadata extension. Service definition looks like

@EndUserText.label: 'Service definition for different tables'
define service /UI_TABLES {
expose /C_Table1 as Table1;
expose /C_Table2 as Table2;
expose /C_Table3 as Table3;
......}

The xml view looks like

<mvc:View controllerName="test.controller.ListReport"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m"
     xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
  xmlns:smartTable="sap.ui.comp.smarttable"
  xmlns:smartFilterBar="sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar">

    <Page id="page" title="{i18n>title}">
        <smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar
            id="smartFilterBar"
            entitySet="Table1"  -> will be set/bind in the controller
            useToolbar="true"
            persistencyKey="SmartFilter"
            header="Filter">
        </smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar>

        <smartTable:SmartTable
            id="smartTable"
            tableType="ResponsiveTable"
            enableExport ="true"
            useVariantManagement="true"
            useTablePersonalisation="true"
            entitySet="Table1"    -> will be set/bind in the controller
            smartFilterId="smartFilterBar"
            header="Dynamic List Report"
            editable="false"
            enableAutoBinding="true" />
    </Page>
</mvc:View>

The problem we are facing is we are missing the annotations in the metadata file. The annotation @Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations is not set. Even when we set the annotations directly in the consumption view the annotations won't become visible in the metadata. 
The view looks like

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'test'
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
serviceQuality: #X,
sizeCategory: #S,
dataClass: #MIXED}

@search.searchable: true
@ui: {headerInfo: {
typeName: 'Option2',
typeNamePlural: 'test',
title: { type: #STANDARD, value: 'LastName' }
}}

define root view entity /C_OPTION2  as select from /I_OPTION2
{
@ui: {
lineItem: [ { position: 10, importance: #HIGH, label: 'ReportDate' } ]}
@search.defaultSearchElement: true
key SystemId,
@ui: {lineItem: [ { position: 20, importance: #HIGH, label: 'ReportDate' } ]}
@search.defaultSearchElement: true
key SysteemMandant,
@ui: {lineItem: [ { position: 30, importance: #HIGH, label: 'FullName' } ]}
@search.defaultSearchElement: true
FirstName,
@ui: {lineItem: [ { position: 50, importance: #HIGH, label: 'Days2exp' } ]}
@search.defaultSearchElement: true
LastName
}

We've tried:

  • annotations in consumption view / annotations in metadata extension
  • with and without @odata.publsh : true
  • with and without @vdm.viewType: #CONSUMPTION

Checking the oData service in segway client  xxxx /UI_TABLES_O2/$metadata no annotations are found for tableX. after changes we cleared the caches /IWBEP/CACHE_CLEANUP and /IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP.

What are we missing? 

Thanks in advance

Lee

entry.title: SAP Fiori Version Update
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We'll need to update the Fiori version for our apps from 1.71.21 to 1.120.14, there is a recommended procedure by SAP to do this? Any tool to facilitate this process? 

Thank you.
Br, Evaristo.

entry.title: Fiori Tiles for AC01/AC02/AC03/AC06
entry.content:
Hello Members,

Is there any FIORI App / Tile for AC0* transactions. Transactions (AC01,AC02,AC03,AC06) related to service master dint have any tiles when searched in FIORI App library. 

Can anyone confirm for AC* transactions, we have to use only through GUI / Is there anything I am missing either from searching / enabling the APP.

 

Regards

Kishore.

entry.title: No Notification Sent to Requestor After Approval/Rejection in Flexible Workflow (Sales Doc. S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently using Flexible Workflow for sales documents, and the approval process is generally working as expected in the Fiori environment.

Approvers can view the documents pending their action through the My Inbox app and are able to approve, reject, or send back for reprocessing. When ı accept or reject sales order , The requester is not notified. For example, whether your order is approved or rejected.

SO, after the approver makes a decision (either approve or reject), the requestor does not receive any kind of notification.

Fiori notification is triggered. I completed nofitication settings, no problem

Nothing appears in the requestor’s My Inbox or Notifications section indicating the outcome.

We would like the requestor to be informed when the status of the document they submitted changes.
Is there a way to enable this kind of notification automatically within the standard functionality?

Worfklow senario send you;

Any suggestions or experience shared would be highly appreciated.


Thanks in advance!

entry.title: AnalyticalTable: Multiple Requests on Scroll and Data Not Bound When Count Is Missing in the result
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm working with sap.ui.table.AnalyticalTable in an SAPUI5 application and currently facing two issues related to scrolling behavior and data binding.

Issue 1: Multiple Backend Requests on Scroll

When a user scrolls to the bottom of the AnalyticalTable, multiple backend requests are triggered to fetch the next set of records. Ideally, I expect only one request per scroll interaction to load the next chunk of data.

  • I have set the threshold property on the table.

  • The table is bound to an OData v2 service.

  • Grouping is enabled on one of the columns.

Questions:

  • Why are multiple requests being triggered on scroll?

  • Is there a way to restrict this behavior so that only one request is made per scroll?

Issue 2: Data Not Bound When __count Is Missing

Due to performance considerations, I tried omitting the __count value from the backend response. While the data is successfully returned from the backend, it does not get bound to the AnalyticalTable.

Here is a sample of the current response returned from the Node.js service:

return {
d: {
results: data || [],
__count: 10000
}
};

If I remove the __count from the response, the table fails to display the data even though the records are present in the payload.

Question:

  • Is __count mandatory for AnalyticalTable to bind and display data correctly?

  • Are there any recommended workarounds for scenarios where the count is intentionally omitted and scroll should work ?

Any insights or guidance on how to resolve these issues would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: What Architecture / Porgraming Modell to use when creating a custom Adobe Form
entry.content:
Hi together,

May you could help us to understand the topic better and get the best practice implementation for an S/4HANA 2023 on premise system.

 

The Requirement:

A collegue created an SQ2 View with several Z-Tabels in SAP GUI and would like to have a custom PDF Form for this. Containing our global design (logo, footer, addresses, etc.). There should be a Fiori Elements App with a print button to prin the selected items.

 

Restrictions:

  • SAP System is on premise S/4HANA 2023 AS ABAP 7.58
  • Adobe Form Technology should be used

 

What we have tried so far / ideas we had to solve the problem:

  • Application Programming Model for SAP Fiori

Created a CDS Datamodel based on the SQ2 view. This dat model was exposed as an Business Object (BOPF) with the action print. The print action calls a traditional print programm (FP_JOB_OPEN, CALL <Generated_Form_Function_Module>, FP_JOB_CLOSE. Fiori Elements App with List Floorplan was created. This approach seems to work.
 

  • RESTful Application Programming

Created CDS entity from SQ2 View. Created behaviour definition with action print. Implemented the classic print programm into the behaviour definition, but got a shortdump, that SUBMIT statement is not supported inside of RAP, which is used in FM FP_GET_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME, to get the generated Form. So we had to stop here.
 

Open Questions

  • What about the S/4HANA Output Management and Fragment based Adobe Forms (with ODATA Service as data provider)?

This topic is hard to grasp, in terms of a custom business object, like we have it here, because of the Z-Tables. I understand that SAP implements the connection to the SAP S/4 HANA Output Management into the SAP Standard Application like Goods Movement or Purchase Order and then you can customize it.

 

  • But how to do this with a custom Application like we have it here? Is this even possible?
  • Can we utilize the Fragment based Forms only with the SAP S/4HANA Output Management?
     
  • What about Key User extensiblity Tools?

I read about Key User Extensiblity and saw that you can create your own business objects and CDS views. Is it somemhow possible to connect these to the S/4HANA Output Management and Adobe Fragment based forms?

I hope you could help us to find the correct approach here.

 

Thank you in advance and Best regards

entry.title: TreeTable - Retain Selection on collapse and expand
entry.content:
For one of our requirement, we are using sap.ui.table.TreeTable to show the hierarchical data. There is an option to select multiple lines and it is working. However, when a Node is collapsed and expanded again, all the previous selections are not visible. Is there any way to retain the selections ?

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pick By Cart - Extension
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am currently using an extended version of EWM_PICA_MANS1 - Pick by Cart standard Fiori App. I have extended couple of controllers and they worked just fine, but now when I planned to extend the Base controller I am getting an issue. I can see the BaseCustom.controller file ready to write logic and same in Manifest.json as extension but while I run the app, this BaseCustom.controller will not load at all. Tried clearing cache, index re-calculation and things.

Really looking forward to any support pointers here.

Thank you,

Vaibhav

entry.title: How to Track Comments on Purchase Orders Pending Approval?
entry.content: When a purchase order is in the approval process and is neither Approved nor Rejected, the PO Processor may add a comment using the "Comment" option from "My Inbox" app. Who is able to view this comment, and where does it appear in the system(Manage Purchase Order)? For example, if the PO Processor wants to place the PO on hold and uses the comment to explain why, where can that information be seen by others?

entry.title: Custom message missing in Response Headers from a Post/Create request
entry.content:
There is a property I need from the response headers in a SAPUI5 app, which is "sap-message". It carries some information after a create request on the model in the SAPUI5 front-end.
On the app with a service pointing to Dev, I do get this property ("sap-message") attached to the headers, as you can see in the below.

The problem is that on the app that is on QA this property is not there, not just that it doesn't have a value, it is totally absent. What might be the cause of this and how to fix it?

Any help with greatly be appreciated.

entry.title: SmartFilterBar with Variant-Management. Working with 1.96, not working on 1.108
entry.content:
Hi Community,

i have an fiori freestyle app running on a onPremise SAP-System with SAPUI5-Version 1.96. With variantmanagment i'm able to add properties of my entity to the filter-fields, store values for filters and save it to variants. I'm also able to manage this variants (delete, save-as, ...).

After changing to SAPUI5-Version 1.106 this variant-management is no longer working anymore. i can add properties to the filterbar but this changes are not saved, also using the filters by adding values into the filterfields with operators simply does not work. 
I could not find anything till now in documentation or here in the community-forum nor in sap-notes. 

Does anyone know something about breaking changes? 

Here a snippet where my smarfilterbar is defined in my view.

<smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar
 id="smartFilterBar"
 liveMode="true"
 entitySet="F4C_CL2WSet"
 persistencyKey="SmartFilter_Explored"
 initialized="onFBInitialized"
 afterVariantLoad="onFBAfterVariantLoad"
 assignedFiltersChanged="onFBAssignedFiltersChanged"
>

This smartfilterbar resides in a headercontent of a ObjectPageLayout.
Additionally i have a Smarttable with the same entityset and which uses the SmartFilterBar for showing the result. Here a snippet of this SmartTable-definiton.

<smartTable:SmartTable										id="smartTable"
entitySet="F4C_CL2WSet"
smartFilterId="smartFilterBar"
useExportToExcel="true"
beforeExport="onBeforeExport"
exportType="UI5Client"
requestAtLeastFields="ClassId,ClassType"
beforeRebindTable="onBeforeRebindTable"
useVariantManagement="true"
useTablePersonalisation="true"
header="{i18n>Belege}"
showRowCount="true"
persistencyKey="Fi4ClsRPS"										enableAutoBinding="true"
class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding"
fitContainer="true"
tableType="{= ${device>/system/desktop} ? 'Table' : 'ResponsiveTable'}"
demandPopin="true">
 <!-- ..Table definition inside.. -->
</smartTable:SmartTable>

When adding a Property to the Filterbar (choosing a property in dialog and then clicking ok-button to apply changes) i get the following error in browser-console:
Console log when adding property to filterbar

 

 

 

But even i get this error the property is now shown in the filterbar and the variant has a "*" signaling a change in variant. Saving works (S/4 1809 Backend).

When selecting the such saved variant, the added property in filterbar is not available (visible) and an error occurs again in console. it comes with some warnings from filterbar. Following is a screenshot of that error:
after selecting my saved variant

Any ideas out there?

kind regards
Matthias

entry.title: SAP Standard Attachment service- API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV- Unable to open the uploaded file.
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on a Fiori Custom application, where I am trying to use the SAP Standard Attachment service- API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to upload/download attachments to a particular business object.

I am able to use the download the file attached to the business object using the GetAllOriginals Function import with relevant parameters passed to it.

But when I try to upload a file to the business object by passing relevant parameters mentioned below, even though if the file(image/pdf/excel/docx) is getting uploaded, when I try to download the uploaded file, below error occurs. Its says "We dont support this file format" for image file and "Excel cannot open file because file format issue or file extension is not valid" for excel file and for so on.

I am passing below payload and Headers to the POST request of AttachmentContentSet entity.

 var oPayload = {
                    LinkedSAPObjectKey: LinkedSAPObjectKey,
                    BusinessObjectTypeName : ObjectType,
                    FileName: oFile.name,
                    MimeType: oFile.type,
                  Content: oBinaryData, // Binary Data file content,
                    DocumentInfoRecordDocType: "GOS"
                };
 
 var oHeaders = {
                    "Slug": oFile.name,
                    "BusinessObjectTypeName": ObjectType,
                    "LinkedSAPObjectKey": LinkedSAPObjectKey,
                    "X-CSRF-Token" : token,
                    "Content-Type" : oFile.type
                };
 
My query is how the file content should be passed in Payload. I referred many SAP community posts and other blogs, still I could not find how this particular "Content" should be passed in payload. I found POST call in a blog, but they did it using POSTMAN and there its not showing exactly how we should send the data from a javascript code perspective.
 
I tried sending the file content as binary data using File reader and readAsBinaryString() function, the issue is not solved.

 

 

Can anyone who have worked on this type of requirement help me on this?
 
Thanks in advance for your help or suggestions.

entry.title: How to throw errors from REST API calls (CAP CDS and Fiori app)
entry.content: I have a CAP and Fiori app. For a particular value help field, I call a REST API inside the handler on READ event of the field. In case the API responds in errors, I can see those errors only in the network tab. The ODATA API call still shows 200. How to propagate the exception to UI?

entry.title: Direct URL to open PO in SAP
entry.content:
Direct URL to open PO in SAP

We need to have a URL to display the PO number in ME23N by passing the PO number in URL.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Fiori App 4988 - Team Member Authorization Status
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding the topic Team Member Authorization Status. We have created a team for PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) Plant Maintenance ( PM ). However, we receive the message that no chekc has been performed for the team members -> Check Not Performed

And my question now is, how can we perform this check so that this Check Not Performed no longer comes up? Is it possible that it is because it is actually a public cloud app, as described in the SAP Fiori Reference Libary https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4988')/S34 ?

Best regards Dominik

entry.title: MRP AREAS |MASS LEVEL with different "REORDER POINTS" "LOT SIZING" "MAXIMUM STOCK"
entry.content:
Is there any way out we can upload MASS level Material MRP AREAS along with different "Reorder Points" "Lot Sizing" "Maximum Stock"

I have seen the provided solutions by Experts with RMMDDIBE which is only for same "REORDERING POINTS"

entry.title: UI5 loading base uri not loading correctly
entry.content:
hi all, new to sap ui5 and fiori

Working through the ui5 sdk demo kit JavaScript tutorials, managed to get to tutorial 25 and having difficulty understanding how why the baseuri "https://services.odata.org" is not being called when i load the application. it appears to still be attempting to use localhost as the base uri

this is my error below, help would be much appreciated

info graph:helpers:ui5Framework Using OpenUI5 version: 1.135.0
Server started
URL: http://localhost:8080
(node:28304) [DEP0060] DeprecationWarning: The `util._extend` API is deprecated. Please use Object.assign() instead.

(Use `node --trace-deprecation ...` to show where the warning was created)


[HPM] Error occurred while proxying request localhost:8080/Northwind/Northwind.svc/$metadata?sap-language=EN to https://services.odata.org/ [UNABLE_TO_GET_ISSUER_CERT_LOCALLY] (https://nodejs.org/api/errors.html#errors_common_system_errors)

entry.title: Issues with Checkbox Binding in Chart of Accounts Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m working on a customization of the Standard Fiori App: Chart of Accounts and I'm encountering an issue with the behavior of CheckBox controls in different views within an IconTabFilter.

The problem arises because one of the IconTabFilter items uses a Tree View (All accounts), while the other uses a List View(Unassigned Accounts)  Both views contain checkboxes that are bound to the selected property. The values are either "X" (which should be true) or an empty string "" (which should be false). but this is causing a UI bug for the user.

Error:
Error: "X" is of type string, expected boolean for property "selected" of Element sap.m.CheckBox#__box225-__clone1365
Error: "" is of type string, expected boolean for property "selected" of Element sap.m.CheckBox#__box225-__clone136

Additionally, I am seeing the following error in the Console Log:

Oops, the Odata service delivered data in wrong order!

entry.title: How to remove the left/right margin?
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is there a way to remove the left/right margin so I can display the entire TreeTable?
